pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the build targets Java 17, failing to leverage Java 21 features and potentially causing incompatibility with libraries requiring Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the Maven compiler plugin to use the release flag matching the java.version property.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the compiler may not strictly enforce bytecode compatibility with Java 21 APIs, or might default to an older source level if not explicitly set.
